task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ArkCase using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface is visible, and the user profile menu or dashboard indicates the user is logged in as 'arkcase-admin' or 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the specific complaint case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case details page or a search result is visible clearly showing the case title 'Improper Records Retention Complaint'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent interacted with the subscription feature for the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking a 'Subscribe' button, toggling a subscription icon (such as a bell or star), or opening a subscription management dialog for the 'Improper Records Retention Complaint' case.

task_completion.description: Verify the subscription is active to receive notifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visual confirmation that the subscription is active, such as a 'Subscribed' status badge, a success toast notification, the button text changing to 'Unsubscribe', or the subscription icon appearing filled/highlighted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the ArkCase GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open displaying the ArkCase interface, rather than a terminal window executing API commands (e.g., curl) or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine ArkCase application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual ArkCase platform with its standard navigation menus, branding, and case management layout, not a mockup or a text document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a text editor to fake task completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors (like Notepad, gedit, or nano) open with text like 'Subscribed to Improper Records Retention Complaint' used to bypass actual system interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target case title is exactly 'Improper Records Retention Complaint'. The required user account is 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'. ArkCase is a web-based case management platform; look for standard UI elements like a 'Subscribe' button, a bell icon, or a star icon that change state (e.g., become filled or change text to 'Unsubscribe') to indicate an active subscription.
